column1: # NOTE: These are calibration parameters, not directly measurable biological values.
# Larval mortality is the primary recruitment-control lever in OSMOSE calibration.
# Adult additional mortality rates (year^-1) — calibrated R18
# Cod increased from 0.05 to 0.20 to implicitly account for grey seal predation.
# ICES estimates grey seal (Halichoerus grypus) population >40,000 in Baltic,
# consuming ~30-50 kt cod/yr (comparable to fishing mortality). With stock ~120 kt,
# seal-induced F ~ 0.25-0.4/yr. Conservative 0.15/yr added to base 0.05.
# Perch/pikeperch slightly increased for cormorant predation in coastal areas.
